name: image-picker
description: One-button image/wallpaper chooser — ImagePickerButton opens a dialog: Gallery (colours/gradients/textures), Upload (inject storage), Link (URL), Unsplash (curated + live search). ImageBanner is the optional reposition-able band (page cover / profile header / hero). Props-driven, imports no other slice + no backend.
notes: Pure client-side slice, not coupled to Notion. The upload backend + Unsplash search are INJECTED: wire onUpload to the `files` slice (useFileUpload) and searchUnsplash to a server route via unsplashSearchVia('/api/unsplash') that holds UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY server-side (never NEXT_PUBLIC). Ships a curated Unsplash fallback + texture gallery so it works with zero config. resolvedUrl for upload (FileRef) values is resolved by the host (files useFileUrl). Headline API = ImagePickerButton; ImageBanner adds drag-to-reposition for cover/hero use.
